interaction_phrase: to help U.S. get quantum ready
occurrence_sentence: NSF Rolls Out Beta Quantum Site to Help U.S. Get Quantum Ready
Critical for the NSF — and for the United States, in general — is to have workers and scientists trained in quantum science.
NSF offers a look at their beta quantum site. Credit: P. Roushan\Martinis lab\UC Santa Barbara
NSF offers a look at their beta quantum site. Credit: P. Roushan\Martinis lab\UC Santa Barbara

interaction_phrase: for the United States, in general
occurrence_sentence: Critical for the NSF — and for the United States, in general — is to have workers and scientists trained in quantum science.
The U.S. also needs a significantly larger, quantum-educated science and engineering workforce ready to develop, operate and maintain the quantum technologies of the future.

Topics * [education](https://thequantuminsider.com/tag/education/), [National Science Foundation](https://thequantuminsider.com/tag/national-science-foundation/), [NSF](https://thequantuminsider.com/tag/nsf/)
